untranslatable_reason: Diamond Bottom is a visual/morphological pattern that requires shape detection (identifying left shoulder, valley, right shoulder forming diamond structure). This cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The source text is also corrupted/unreadable, preventing extraction of precise quantitative thresholds. Pattern recognition requires either a dedicated pattern-detection indicator or multi-candle structure analysis not supported by the allowed operator set.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using Donchian Channel breakout (close > upper band for entry, close < middle for exit) as a proxy for breakout confirmation, but this does not capture the core diamond shape formation requirement. A proper implementation would require either: (1) a diamond_pattern indicator, (2) multi-bar high/low comparison logic, or (3) visual pattern recognition capabilities not available in this rule engine.
